metadata.title: Infinex — AI-Powered Margin Growth
metadata.description: Infinex helps SMBs increase their margins with AI. Automation, productivity, training — concrete results in just weeks.

hero.title: Increase your margins with AI.
hero.subtitle: Less busywork. More productivity. Results in weeks, not months.
hero.description: We automate your processes, train your teams, and cut your admin overhead. Same headcount, more output — and better quality.

approach.sectionSubtitle: Three concrete steps to fast results.

audit.title: Audit & Diagnostic
audit.description: We analyze your processes in detail to find where AI can cut costs and save time. You walk away with a clear, actionable plan with numbers.

implementation.title: Deployment
implementation.description: We set up the automations and AI tools tailored to your business. No theory, just action — you see the first results quickly.

training.title: Training
training.description: We train your teams on the best AI tools so they become self-sufficient. Hands-on workshops they can apply the very next day.

useCases.title: What we actually do
useCases.subtitle: Concrete AI solutions that directly impact your margins.

items.title: Admin automation
items.description: Invoices, follow-ups, data entry, reporting — we automate everything that wastes your time and money.

items.title: AI assistants for your teams
items.description: Your employees get an AI assistant for daily tasks: writing, summaries, research, customer responses.

items.title: Reporting & dashboards
items.description: Your data turned into actionable insights. Make better decisions faster with intelligent dashboards.

items.title: Enhanced client management
items.description: Faster responses, personalized follow-up, higher satisfaction. AI improves every client interaction.

items.title: Hands-on AI training
items.description: Your teams trained on the most powerful AI tools. ChatGPT, Claude, business tools — 100% practical workshops.

items.title: Prospecting agents
items.description: AI agents that qualify your leads, enrich your contacts, and prepare your sales meetings automatically.

items.quote: We used to spend so much time on admin. Now it's handled, and my teams can finally focus on what actually drives revenue.
items.author: Jeremy, Head of Operations

items.quote: We'd been doing everything manually for years without questioning it. Once it was automated, we wondered why we hadn't done it sooner.
items.author: Xavier, CEO

items.quote: What really changed is that everyone on the team now knows how to use AI daily. It unlocked something.
items.author: Gabriel, CEO

items.question: How does it work in practice?
items.answer: We start with a process audit. We identify quick wins and deploy the first automations. Results come quickly.

items.question: What results can I expect and how quickly?
items.answer: On average, our clients reduce their admin workload by 60% and gain 40% in productivity. First results are visible in 3 weeks, full ROI in under 2 months.

items.question: What type of business is this for?
items.answer: SMBs with 5 to 200 employees that want to produce more with the same team. Industry doesn't matter — if you have repetitive processes, we can help.

items.question: How much does it cost?
items.answer: Every project is different. We offer a free initial conversation to understand your needs and give you a precise estimate. The investment is always lower than the savings generated.

finalCta.title: Ready to increase your margins?
finalCta.subtitle: A 15-minute chat is all it takes to identify your first opportunities. No commitment.

about.title: About
about.metaDescription: Infinex helps SMBs increase their margins with AI. Discover our vision, mission, and values.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.description: A world where every SMB uses AI to work smarter, not harder. Where technology frees up time for what truly matters: serving your clients and growing your business.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: Make AI accessible and profitable for SMBs. We turn technological complexity into concrete results: less overhead, more productivity, better margins.

items.title: Results first
items.description: We don't sell advice, we deliver results. Every action is measured by its impact on your margins.

items.title: Total transparency
items.description: No jargon, no empty promises. We tell you exactly what we do, how much it costs, and what it returns.

items.title: Speed of execution
items.description: First results in 3 weeks, not 6 months. We move fast because your time is money.

items.title: Lasting partnership
items.description: We build long-term relationships. Your success is our best advertisement.
